visual: Pivots the body, deflects with a backfist, parries with an open hand, then steps into a bow stance delivering a straight fist punch at mid-level.
motion_description: In a continuous, flowing motion, the practitioner shifts their weight backward and pivots the torso 180 degrees, sweeping both arms downward and outward. The right foot steps forward and plants as the right arm arcs into a mid-level backfist, while the left open hand parries across the center of the chest. Finally, the left foot steps forward into a bow stance, and weight shifts onto the front leg as the right arm delivers a straight punch at chest height, with the left hand retracting to rest beside the right elbow.
